triage_rows.detail: the first canonical-seed simulator exists and respects next-bar-open execution timing
all seed fills occur on trigger_minute + 1 with no same-bar execution exception
seed simulation does not authorize binding into a separate intraday replay lane yet

interpretation: V1.34D converts the first seed-session intraday simulator run into a governance triage result.
The branch may keep building inside phase 2, but replay binding remains blocked and the first-hour horizon limit must stay explicit.
